elements.text:
Your rent is due soon, and you also need to buy textbooks for your classes. Your budget is tight this month, and you think about how you'll afford all of this.

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I want to avoid dealing with this situation, but decide to make a budget to help organize my finances.
I just want to be lazy and take a nap, but decide to start making a plan.
I ask a friend for help with coming up with a plan.
I talk to my professor about affordable textbook options.
